title: Junior Instructional Designer at IIT Bombay Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Junior Instructional Designer at IIT Bombay Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
IIT Bombay Digital Technologies, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Instructional Designer for our Rajkot operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIT Bombay Digital Technologies:
IIT Bombay Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Support students with special educational needs
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Classroom Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIT Bombay Digital Technologies!
